tasks.subject: Task 0: CSS — full rewrite of style.css
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace every line of style.css with a token-based, light-only design system; remove all gradients, glassmorphism, and 999px pills.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `style.css` contains `:root` with all design tokens
- [ ] No `radial-gradient`, `backdrop-filter`, or `box-shadow` on buttons
- [ ] No `border-radius: 999px`
- [ ] Body background `#f1f5f9`; `.app` background `#ffffff`
- [ ] `.status` uses `border-left: 3px solid` colouring
- [ ] `.pill.active` and `.pill:hover` use indigo variants
- [ ] New classes present: `.custom-fields`, `.format-strip`, `.format-custom`, `.toggle-btn`, `.erweitert-fields`
- [ ] No `@media (prefers-color-scheme: light)` block

**Verify:** `grep -n "radial-gradient\|backdrop-filter\|999px\|prefers-color-scheme" style.css` → zero matches. Open in browser — body is light grey, app card is white.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'radial-gradient\\|backdrop-filter\\|999px\\|prefers-color-scheme' style.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No radial-gradient, backdrop-filter, or 999px border-radius", "Body background #f1f5f9, .app background #ffffff", "Token-based :root block present", "New classes: .custom-fields, .format-strip, .format-custom, .toggle-btn, .erweitert-fields"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: HTML — restructure index.html
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update HTML to match new design — simplified header, progressive disclosure markup, format strip, Erweitert toggle, GitHub footer.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Header: wordmark h1 with `.app-title-accent` span, badge — no version, no description paragraph
- [ ] Zeilen/Spalten/Seiten wrapped in `#splitCustomFields` div with class `custom-fields`
- [ ] Preset pill for custom reads `Eigene … ▾`
- [ ] `<select id="outPreset">` replaced by `.format-strip` with four `data-format` buttons
- [ ] W/H inputs in `#formatCustomFields` with class `format-custom`
- [ ] Rand + Überlappung in `#erweiterFields`, preceded by `#erweiterToggle` button
- [ ] Status element has class `status` (not `status-pill`)
- [ ] Footer version is `<a href="https://github.com/si0nDE/cutpdf.app" …>`

**Verify:** Open `index.html` in browser — header shows wordmark + badge, format buttons visible in a row, Rand/Überlappung not visible (JS not wired yet).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Header has wordmark and badge only", "splitCustomFields div present", "format-strip with four data-format buttons present", "formatCustomFields div present", "erweiterToggle button and erweiterFields div present", "Status class is 'status' not 'status-pill'", "Footer version links to GitHub"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: JS — wire progressive disclosure and format strip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update app.js so all new interactive elements work: preset pills show/hide custom fields, format buttons replace the old select, Erweitert toggle reveals rand/overlap, generate handler reads new state.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Clicking non-custom preset hides `#splitCustomFields`; clicking `data-preset="custom"` shows it and focuses rows
- [ ] Format buttons manage `.active` class; Kachelgröße active by default
- [ ] `#formatCustomFields` hidden by default; shown only when `data-format="custom"` active
- [ ] Erweitert toggle shows/hides `#erweiterFields` and updates its own label
- [ ] Generate handler uses `activeFormat` variable (not `outPresetEl`)
- [ ] `setFileInfo` preserves `.file-info` base class

**Verify:** Full manual flow in browser:
1. Load PDF → indigo border on file-info
2. Click 'Eigene … ▾' → rows/cols/pages appear
3. Click 'Halbieren ↕' → rows/cols/pages disappear
4. Click 'Eigenes …' format button → W/H inputs appear
5. Click 'Kachelgröße' → W/H inputs disappear
6. Click 'Erweitert ▾' → Rand/Überlappung appear, label becomes 'Erweitert ▴'
7. Generate PDF with 2×2 split → download link appears with indigo status

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app.js"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Preset pills manage splitCustomFields visibility", "Format buttons manage formatCustomFields visibility", "activeFormat variable drives generate handler", "Erweitert toggle works", "setFileInfo preserves file-info class"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
